prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~6.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 92.7 kg; Height 181.6 cm; BMI 28.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 116/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.5%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 10.5%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.4%), FPG (12 months ago 303mg/dL; 9 months ago 262mg/dL; 6 months ago 277mg/dL; 3 months ago 225mg/dL; current 227mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 96.2kg; 9 months ago 93.7kg; 6 months ago 93.3kg; 3 months ago 93.1kg; current 92.7kg), Height (12 months ago 181.6cm; 9 months ago 181.6cm; 6 months ago 181.6cm; 3 months ago 181.6cm; current 181.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 28.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 116mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 73mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 21U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 27U/L; current 23U/L), AST (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 29U/L; current 28U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 86mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 85mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 86mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 87mL/min/1.73m²; current 86mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 73mg/g; 9 months ago 69mg/g; 6 months ago 50mg/g; 3 months ago 70mg/g; current 65mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 87mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 59mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 60mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 177mg/dL; 9 months ago 161mg/dL; 6 months ago 175mg/dL; 3 months ago 181mg/dL; current 170mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.2g/dL; 9 months ago 14.3g/dL; 6 months ago 14.3g/dL; 3 months ago 14.3g/dL; current 13.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
